name: dev-loop
description: Generic single-pass PRD + skillwiki dev cycle engine. v1.16.2: QUERY step adds stale-premise check — cross-references user-named transcript paths/topic labels against `_archive/raw/transcripts/` + recent git log; strong stale-premise (both signals fire) stops cycle before WORK. Prevents re-discovery loop from misfiring crons or stale prompts. v1.16.1: setup-dev-loop Section M now probes Codex via `codex-companion.mjs setup --json` runtime check (authoritative ready/codex.available signal). v1.16.0: auto-archive originating raw transcripts on work-item completion via `closes:` frontmatter convention — RETRO step parses closes list and runs `skillwiki archive` per entry. v1.15.0: pluggable multi-backend code review — CODE_REVIEW_BACKENDS resolved at REFRESH; REVIEW step 6 spawns simplify-worker (always) + optional codex-review-worker (per-intensity opt-in) in parallel. v1.14.0: doctor-worker probes auto-compact firings via isCompactSummary:true in session jsonl. v1.13.0: removed /compact + /clear refs. v1.12.0: dep-drift detector via dev-loop:doctor-worker. MERGE CI gate uses ci-health-worker. Execution subagents hard-wired to sonnet. /setup-dev-loop scaffolds 13 config sections (A-M). Pluggable knowledge backends, drift guard, project-agnostic.
